---
title: "Projects"
subtitle: "Reproducible research with live, executable Python code"
listing:
  contents: projects.yml
  sort: "date desc"
  type: grid
  grid-columns: 2
  image-height: 220px
  categories: true
  sort-ui: true
  filter-ui: true
  fields: [image, date, title, description, categories]
format:
  html:
    toc: false
page-layout: full
---

Welcome to my projects portfolio. Each project below contains **fully executable Python code**, interactive visualisations, and reproducible results. Use the category filter to browse by topic.
